escaped
result.signature:
pub fn escaped<I, Error, F, G>(
  normal: F,
  control_char: char,
  escapable: G,
) -> impl Parser<I, Output = I, Error = Error>
where
  I: Input + Clone + crate::traits::Offset,
  <I as Input>::Item: crate::traits::AsChar,
  F: Parser<I, Error = Error>,
  G: Parser<I, Error = Error>,
  Error: ParseError<I>,
{
  Escaped {
    normal,
    escapable,
    control_char,
    e: PhantomData,
  }
}

result.name: process
escaped_transform
result.signature:
pub fn escaped_transform<I, Error, F, G, ExtendItem, Output>(
  normal: F,
  control_char: char,
  transform: G,
) -> impl Parser<I, Output = Output, Error = Error>
where
  I: Clone + crate::traits::Offset + Input,
  I: crate::traits::ExtendInto<Item = ExtendItem, Extender = Output>,
  <F as Parser<I>>::Output: crate::traits::ExtendInto<Item = ExtendItem, Extender = Output>,
  <G as Parser<I>>::Output: crate::traits::ExtendInto<Item = ExtendItem, Extender = Output>,
  <I as Input>::Item: crate::traits::AsChar,
  F: Parser<I, Error = Error>,
  G: Parser<I, Error = Error>,
  Error: ParseError<I>,
{
  EscapedTransform {
    normal,
    control_char,
    transform,
    e: PhantomData,
    extend: PhantomData,
    o: PhantomData,
  }
}

rawResponse.instructions:
You are an assistant that solves benchmark tasks using only the available operations.
Tasks may include question answering, retrieval, extraction, analysis, or code-related tasks.
Use the available functions or tools to gather the information needed to complete the task.
Guidelines:
- Use only information obtained from the available operations.
- If the available information is insufficient, say so.
- Be concise and precise.
- Do not make assumptions or use external knowledge.

tools.description: List visible repository files and metadata for a RepoQA workspace.
tools.name: list_files

tools.description: List code symbols and metadata for a RepoQA workspace. Optional filters: path and kind. kind='function' searches callable code, including methods; exact parser kinds such as 'method', 'class', and other kinds present in parsed.json may also be used.
tools.name: list_symbols

tools.description: Return one RepoQA symbol, including its generated visible code.
tools.name: get_symbol

tools.description: Read one generated visible file from a RepoQA workspace.
tools.name: read_file

result.signature:
pub fn escaped<I, Error, F, G>(
  normal: F,
  control_char: char,
  escapable: G,
) -> impl Parser<I, Output = I, Error = Error>
where
  I: Input + Clone + crate::traits::Offset,
  <I as Input>::Item: crate::traits::AsChar,
  F: Parser<I, Error = Error>,
  G: Parser<I, Error = Error>,
  Error: ParseError<I>,
{
  Escaped {
    normal,
    escapable,
    control_char,
    e: PhantomData,
  }
}

result.signature:
pub fn escaped_transform<I, Error, F, G, ExtendItem, Output>(
  normal: F,
  control_char: char,
  transform: G,
) -> impl Parser<I, Output = Output, Error = Error>
where
  I: Clone + crate::traits::Offset + Input,
  I: crate::traits::ExtendInto<Item = ExtendItem, Extender = Output>,
  <F as Parser<I>>::Output: crate::traits::ExtendInto<Item = ExtendItem, Extender = Output>,
  <G as Parser<I>>::Output: crate::traits::ExtendInto<Item = ExtendItem, Extender = Output>,
  <I as Input>::Item: crate::traits::AsChar,
  F: Parser<I, Error = Error>,
  G: Parser<I, Error = Error>,
  Error: ParseError<I>,
{
  EscapedTransform {
    normal,
    control_char,
    transform,
    e: PhantomData,
    extend: PhantomData,
    o: PhantomData,
  }
}
